chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA. Cr. Bail Appln. No. S- 98 of 2022. Date Order with signature of Hon’ble Judge 1.For orders on M.A No. 941 of 2022. 2.For orders on office objection as flag A. 3.For orders on M.A No. 942 of 2022. 4.For hearing of bail application.. 07.3.2022. Mr. Gulsher Junejo, Advocate for the applicant. ===== 1. Urgency granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Deferred. 4. Learned 1st Additional Sessions Judge, Qamber has dismissed the bail application of the applicant only for the reason that challan of the case has not yet been submitted; such dismissal of bail application of the applicant could hardly be justified; therefore, it shall be deemed to be pending, to be disposed of by him on merits. JUDGE
